question.title: CNS-028v2 iter-4 — plan v5 absorption of iter-3 1B'''+4W'' (5 absorbs, output_parse rule extension as new contract surface)
question.body:
Plan v5 absorption of iter-3 verdict PARTIAL (1B''' + 4W''):

B3''' adapter→orchestrator typed payload kontratı: Çözüm output_parse rule extension. agent-adapter-contract.schema::output_parse[] rule item shape genişlemesi (~25 satır): {json_path, capability?, schema_ref?} — backwards compatible (eski rules capability/schema_ref olmadan da geçerli). Capability-aware typed payload extraction. Mevcut PR-A3 JSONPath subset ($.key(.key)*, no indices/wildcards) korunur.

Çağrı zinciri (driver-managed mode, PR-A4b yerleşik pattern reuse, single-pass): Adapter envelope'da review_findings field döner → Executor.run_step(driver_managed=True) output_parse rules walk eder → json_path extract → schema_ref validate → fail ise AdapterOutputParseError(category=output_parse_failed) → pass ise artifacts.write_artifact() → step_record.output_ref.

W2'' (price-catalog conditional semantik): 'top-level source == vendor_api ise her entries[*] için vendor_model_id zorunlu' (catalog-level conditional).

W3'' (load_default full filename): load_default('catalogs', 'price-catalog.v1.json') — mevcut config.py:77 pattern uyumlu.

W4'' (scope table singular drift): 'kind=catalog' singular metin plural'a çevrildi.

W5'' (v2 absorb duplicate): İkinci tekrar silindi (verify: grep -c 'v2 key absorb' → 1).

Plan v5 final boyutlar: 4 docs + 8 schemas + 3 schema delta (2 enum + 1 output_parse extension) + 3 policies + 2 bundled + 1 config delta + ~35 test, ~1730 satır. Yeni evidence kind: 0. Yeni adapter capability: 1. Yeni core dep: 0.

iter-4 tek teyit sorusu Q13: output_parse rule item shape extension review_findings için typed payload kontratını gerçekten kilitliyor mu? B6 runtime'da rule walker bu shape üzerinden extract+validate yapacak. Eksik bir şey var mı?
